hero.title:
Small details.
Big Style.
hero.subtitle: Premium handmade aesthetic accessories for your everyday look.

products.name: Onyx Beaded Bracelet
products.desc: Minimalist matte onyx stones carefully strung together for an elegant everyday look. Handmade with durable stretch cord.

products.name: Silver Initial Charm
products.desc: A subtle, personalized touch to your phone. Made from high-quality stainless steel that won't tarnish over time.

products.name: Leather Loop Keychain
products.desc: Premium vegan leather loop with a sturdy matte black ring. Keep your keys organized in style.

products.name: Pearl Drop Bracelet
products.desc: Freshwater pearls combined with a delicate gold-filled chain. Elevate any outfit effortlessly.

products.name: Aura Phone String
products.desc: Aesthetic clear beads catching the light perfectly. Adds personality and security to your mobile device.

products.name: Minimalist Bar Keychain
products.desc: Sleek geometric bar design that fits perfectly in your pocket without the bulk.
